rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §43.071, which governs acceptance of gifts and donations for the permanent school fund.
quote: The corporation may accept, and establish a nonprofit corporation or other entity for the purpose of accepting, a gift, grant, donation, or bequest of money, securities, property, or any other assets from any public or private source for the permanent school fund.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns PSF gift acceptance, unrelated to homestead exemption.
